summary: The diff implements grouped display layout with expandable rows, ageing badges, image modal, and filters/search across TotalOrdersTab, ReadyTab, and HallmarkTab. All four requirements appear to be substantially implemented. One minor gap exists: the REQ-4 acceptance criterion requiring filters to reset when switching tabs is not verifiable from the diff. One hallucinated feature (date range filter) is present in HallmarkTab beyond what was requested.

missing_requirements.reason: Each tab holds its own local filter state via useState, which resets on unmount. However, if tabs are kept mounted in a tab panel, filters would persist across tab switches. The diff does not show an explicit reset mechanism such as a useEffect on tab activation, so this AC cannot be confirmed as fully met.

hallucinated_features.description: Date range filter (startDate and endDate) added to HallmarkTab
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requested a search bar and two dropdowns (order type and karigar). No date range filter was specified for any tab. HallmarkTab introduces startDate and endDate state variables and applies date-range filtering logic not mentioned in any requirement.
